name: hr-assessment-extension-proposal
purpose: Record schema gaps discovered after two fictional pilots without replacing the v0.5 schema yet.

proposed_fields.reason: The public pilot needs an explicit marker that a record is fictional or de-identified.
The record stores weighted_score but not the weight table used to produce it.
Evidence confidence should be tracked per dimension, not only at application level.
Both fictional pilots recommend trial tasks, but the current schema has no structured trial task object.
Trainability is important but not yet supported by structured feedback evidence.
Kevin needs to know whether a person reduces or increases coordination load.
Redaction pass/fail should point to a concrete scan report.

recommendation: Keep v0.5 as the stable base for now. Use this proposal to design v0.9 only after one more fictional or private de-identified pilot.
